mistralai/Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.2.matched_phenotypes: facial edema, hepatosplenomegaly, neurological symptoms (dyspnea, exertional intolerance, sleep disturbances)
renal involvement (nephropathy, nephrosis), cardiac manifestations (cardiomyopathy, arrhythmias), angioedema, gastrointestinal issues (abdominal pain, diarrhea)
dry skin, joint pains, kidney problems (hematuria, nephritis, decreased albumin), autoantibodies production (elevated CRP and ANCAs)
recurrent infections (anemia, chronic sinopulmonary infection), poor appetite, abnormal immunoglobulin levels (IgG subclass deficiencies, monoclonal IgA elevation)
liver cirrhosis, emphysema, pulmonary function impairment, increased risk of lung cancer
fever episodes with serositis (pleurisy, pericarditis), abdominal pain, rash, amyloid A deposits
easy bruising or bleeding, prolonged menstrual periods, excessive blood loss during surgery or injury, mild thromboembolisms
medullary thyroid carcinoma, Marfanoid habitus, mucosal neuromas, phaeochromocytoma
periodic fevers, inflammasomopathy, rashes, eye inflammation
